summary: Dashboard view sub-model with date navigation (◄/►), expandable summary cards, filtering by source type, and filter overlay integration
side_effects: modifies UI state based on key input
triggers date-based data reloading via loadSummariesMsg
config_deps: keys.go (key bindings: Left, Right, Down, Up, Toggle, ExpandAll, CollapseAll, Filter, FilterPicker)
styles.go (dateStyle, helpDescStyle, expandedArrowStyle, collapsedArrowStyle, sourceTypeBadgeStyle, selectedCardStyle, summaryTextStyle)
notes: Second main view (beside channels.go). Manages: 1) currentDate navigation (◄/►), 2) SummaryItem list with SourceFilter, 3) expand/collapse state per card (expanded map), 4) scroll-to-cursor logic, 5) filter cycling (f key cycles through source types), 6) filter overlay (shift+f). Key rendering: source badges ([TG], [RSS], [RD], [HN]), summary bullets with spacing, cursor highlighting. Filters summaries by SourceFilter.Types and ChannelName. Delegates overlay to filterOverlayModel.
